    Thousands Of 5-Star Reviews!

    Love the color, love the ring!

    This is my second enso ring. I love this product as I’m very active with outrigger paddling, and cycling. This ring is very light and the air channels on the inside are amazing! It allows enough airflow to keep my finger dry while paddling, and doesn’t leave that gross trapped water feel.

    Aleks R.

    Verified Customers

    Happy Nerd Here!

    Hubby loves his new ring. It's light, and he doesn't even feel it. It doesn't pull on the hair on his fingers. And he genuinely likes it, because he likes to show it off. That's awesome.

    Connie H.

    Verified Customers

    So Pretty!

    Love this ring, the pattern looks great! I was worried that it wouldn’t be as flexible as the other rings since it has a two color design but it was still super comfy and flexible.

    Melissa V.

    Verified Customers

    Wear it all the time!

    I had it engraved because I found out on 09.11.2023 that I had skin malignant melanoma cancer on my chest/collar bone and deep down in my chest wall. So it has the date, my nickname my mama called me, Kath and the word survivor. Great quality ring!

    Kathryn M.

    Verified Customers

    Pictures do not do these justice!

    My partner and I got these as what we’re calling pre-engagement / devotion rings, and they are just absolutely gorgeous! I honestly was not expecting this degree of quality, detail, and beauty, from a very affordable silicone ring.

    Hades

    Verified Customers

    Love our Ensos!

    My husband and I got enso rings because we are in the military and we can’t wear metal jewelry to work. I got the Diamond and he got navy blue and we love them! The silver gets mistaken for metal all the time and he says his is more comfortable than a metal ring. I barely even feel mine and we are both half sizes so we went down to the next whole size and they fit perfect!

    Maizy M.

    Verified Customers
